title: Apply security measures for medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply security measures for medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify security control measures

pcs.text: Identify and access organisation documents relating to security arrangements of medicinal cannabis site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and access organisation documents relating to security arrangements of medicinal cannabis site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access organisation documents relating to security arrangements of medicinal cannabis site.

pcs.text: Identify security threats to the organisation from documents and relevant legislation and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify security threats to the organisation from documents and relevant legislation and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify security threats to the organisation from documents and relevant legislation and regulations.

pcs.text: Assess risks and identify control measures to minimise the risk of diversion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess risks and identify control measures to minimise the risk of diversion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess risks and identify control measures to minimise the risk of diversion.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify security control measures

elements.title: Apply security control measures

pcs.text: Apply control measures related to the physical security of cannabis, including transfer within site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply control measures related to the physical security of cannabis, including transfer within site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply control measures related to the physical security of cannabis, including transfer within site.

pcs.text: Apply control measures related to the immediate reporting of loss or theft of cannabis, including communication with emergency services, police and local government authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply control measures related to the immediate reporting of loss or theft of cannabis, including communication with emergency services, police and local government authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply control measures related to the immediate reporting of loss or theft of cannabis, including communication with emergency services, police and local government authorities.

pcs.text: Apply control measures related to the safe and secure disposal or destruction of cannabis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply control measures related to the safe and secure disposal or destruction of cannabis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply control measures related to the safe and secure disposal or destruction of cannabis.

pcs.text: Apply control measures related to the safety and security of the supply, delivery and transportation of cannabis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply control measures related to the safety and security of the supply, delivery and transportation of cannabis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply control measures related to the safety and security of the supply, delivery and transportation of cannabis.

pcs.text: Incorporate control measures into own work and the work of others of responsibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate control measures into own work and the work of others of responsibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate control measures into own work and the work of others of responsibility.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Apply security control measures

elements.title: Maintain records related to security of medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Monitor records of supply and traceability of cannabis to ensure that they are completed and maintained according to workplace and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor records of supply and traceability of cannabis to ensure that they are completed and maintained according to workplace and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor records of supply and traceability of cannabis to ensure that they are completed and maintained according to workplace and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Check and retain site monitoring and surveillance data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and retain site monitoring and surveillance data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and retain site monitoring and surveillance data.

elements.title: Monitor security procedural measures

pcs.text: Monitor effectiveness of workplace policies and procedures in addressing physical security measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor effectiveness of workplace policies and procedures in addressing physical security measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor effectiveness of workplace policies and procedures in addressing physical security measures.

pcs.text: Train staff in workplace policies and procedures, and conduct regular drills in preparation for intrusion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train staff in workplace policies and procedures, and conduct regular drills in preparation for intrusion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train staff in workplace policies and procedures, and conduct regular drills in preparation for intrusion.

pcs.text: Monitor work duties of self and others to ensure workplace policies and procedures are applied appropriately
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor work duties of self and others to ensure workplace policies and procedures are applied appropriately?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor work duties of self and others to ensure workplace policies and procedures are applied appropriately.

pcs.text: Report issues and concerns with security to senior personnel according to workplace and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report issues and concerns with security to senior personnel according to workplace and regulatory requirements.
